title: Citizens Progression
description: The Villagers have Expanded. Explore the towns and have fun with friends.
body: The villagers have become more intelligent, leading them to share their newfound knowledge throughout the village. As you look around, you may find an Asian Food Cart that contains food inside of it; the Lumber House, a sturdy structure housing the wood that forms the very foundation of the towns; Villager Towns; and last but not least the Fisherman's Cabin, a retreat by the swamp's edge. This modpack offers a lot to a player for Roleplay and survival. Most of the structures have been deleted along with mobs such as most hostile mobs, which will add a weird but interesting twist to the gameplay experience. (Warning: You cannot beat the game with this modpack, as it is designed to simulate real-life structures and ideas.)
